summary: Built DDay Counter app with React+TS+Vite+Tailwind v4+Supabase+React Router. Implemented Landing (event cards + D-day count), Create form (/create with date picker + color presets), Event detail (/event/:id with big D-day number, share, delete). All pages use shared Navbar, LoadingSpinner, EventCard components with service layer and useDayCount hook. Build passes with 75 modules.
issues: Chunk size warning: single JS bundle is 632 kB (183 kB gzip) — acceptable for this scope, no code-splitting required by task spec
next_actions: Deploy to Vercel or hosting platform
Consider lazy-loading routes for bundle size improvement
